title: Classic Musakhan Chicken
description: A traditional Middle Eastern dish originating from Palestine, Musakhan is a simple yet flavorful meal made with chicken, onions, and sumac, served with warm flatbread.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt, black pepper, and sumac.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they're softened and lightly caramelized.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until browned on both sides and cooked through.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Warm the flatbread by wrapping it in foil and baking it in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
Serve the chicken with the warm flatbread, onions, and a sprinkle of sumac.
